name: Saracen Mineral Holdings Limited
description: Saracen Mineral Holdings Limited was an Australian gold mining and exploration company headquartered in Perth, Western Australia. The company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold assets, primarily operating the Carosue Dam and Thunderbox projects located near Kalgoorlie. Saracen was recognized as a significant gold producer in the region before it merged with Northern Star Resources Limited in 2021. Following the merger, Saracen became a subsidiary of Northern Star, consolidating its operations to enhance production capacity and extend the life of its high-quality Australian gold mining assets.
